name: startup-framework
description: Per-friend wiki + curated stack + Activity Feed + self-improving skills. The plugin's source-of-truth version lives in this field; the marketplace entry omits version to avoid drift (per CC docs, plugin.json wins silently when both are set).

wikiRoot.title: Wiki location
wikiRoot.description: Where your personal wiki lives on disk. Default: ~/.startup-framework/wiki/ (matches ADR-017 + ADR-027). Used by every framework command that reads or writes the wiki.

activityFeedUrl.title: Activity Feed repo URL
activityFeedUrl.description: The shared private GitHub repo for cross-friend session reports (e.g. your-group/activity-feed). Set during /sf:install Stage 3. Leave blank to disable Activity Feed integration.

activityFeedLocalClone.title: Activity Feed local clone path
activityFeedLocalClone.description: Local path where the Activity Feed repo is cloned. Default: ~/.startup-framework/activity-feed/. Read by /sf:wrap to append + push, read by /sf:wake-up to pull + summarize.

snapshotRetain.title: Schema snapshot retention
snapshotRetain.description: How many pre-migration wiki snapshots to keep at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/wiki-snapshots/ before pruning. Default: 3 (per ADR-027). Increase if you want a longer rollback window; decrease to save disk.

rcChannel.title: Subscribe to release candidates
rcChannel.description: When true, /sf:update --rc and /sf:doctor will track sf-marketplace-rc in addition to stable. Friends who want early access enable this; everyone else leaves it off and rides the monthly stable cadence (per ADR-019).
